title_en: Select Square Enix Games Have Received Big Discounts at Best Buy – Save on Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth, Octopath Traveler 0, and More
summary_en: Best Buy has dropped the prices of select Square Enix games. Score big discounts on Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth, Octopath Traveler 0, and more.
body_en:
Even though big summer sales like Amazon Prime Day are behind us, Best Buy isn't slowing down just yet. If you're still hoping to score some video game deals, the retailer has dropped some seriously good discounts on a selection of Square Enix games.
To highlight a few of our favorites, Best Buy is offering Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth on PS5 for $19.99, Final Fantasy 7 Remake Intergrade on Switch 2 for $29.99, and Dragon Quest III HD-2D Remake on PS5 for $19.99, but that's not all. Have a look through even more of our top picks from the retailer below.
Some of the deal prices above even match prices we saw during Prime Day - like on Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth and Final Fantasy 7 Remake Intergrade - making now as good a time as any to grab them. Dragon Quest III HD-2D Remake even appears to be priced lower than the $24.99 that we saw during that sale, which is a huge win if you haven't picked it up yet.
I honestly think now is the best time to grab FF7 Rebirth and FF7 Remake Intergrade, in particular. With Final Fantasy VII Revelation now announced and set to be released next year, it's perfect timing to pick up its predecessors on sale and play through them ahead of time. In general, they're excellent RPGs to play through as well, with an unforgettable story and characters, so certainly worth adding to your library.
Among these games is also Life is Strange: Reunion , which came out just a few months ago. IGN's Nick Maillet said in our review that it's "a fitting end to the decade-spanning Max and Chloe saga." So if you're a fan of the other Life is Strange games, it sounds like you'll be in for quite a treat with this one.
There's plenty more Square Enix deals to explore in Best Buy's offerings, though. You can have a look at every game on sale here , and if you're curious when the next big sale event will be, you actually don't have to wait too long. Fourth of July sales are the next to pop up , and we'll be keeping an eye out for any more video game deals that may drop during it.
Hannah Hoolihan is a freelancer who writes with the guides and commerce teams here at IGN.
